request:
• WA_04_Setup Onboarding Flow: should setup responses be generated via Anthropic Claude or use a deterministic state-machine script?

Use Claude-generated setup responses.

The setup flow must still remain strictly stage-based and deterministic in logic, but the user-facing wording should be generated by Claude to maintain natural Hebrew and conversational quality.

• WA_08_Demo Learning Phase: what format does the business owner use to respond during a simulation session?

Use the same inbound webhook and the same payload structure.

The supervisor should route to WA_08 based on session_mode = learning_mode, not based on a different payload format.

• Multi-tenancy bootstrapping: when a brand-new session_id arrives with no existing session record, should WA_02 auto-create a new session + placeholder business, or require explicit business creation first?

When a brand-new session starts, the system should first show a business selection menu.

Behavior:
- load existing businesses from DB
- display them as numbered options
- map each displayed number to the real business record behind the scenes
- option 0 = create new business

If the user selects 0, only then create a new business and continue into setup flow.

Do not auto-create a placeholder business before the user explicitly chooses to create one.

• WA_05 rewrite attempt limit: how many Claude rewrite attempts should WA_05 make before returning failure/escalation?

Use 2 rewrite attempts maximum.

If validation still fails after 2 attempts, return failure / escalation signal to the supervisor.
resolve all the "needs review" workflows, make sure they all connected.
